items.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
items.content: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

items.title: Apple raises Mac and iPad prices, spares iPhone for now
items.content: Apple raises prices of MacBook Air and Pro along with iPad Air and Pro.

items.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
items.content: The incident comes as Tata Electronics expands its role in global technology supply chains.

items.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
items.content: European offensive cybersecurity company Paradigm Shift released details of a flaw and a technique to exploit it that opens the door for hackers to unlock and break into older

items.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
items.content: The company says the increases are being driven by rising memory and console storage prices, with costs more than 2.5x higher than previous levels.

items.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
items.content: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

items.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
items.content: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

items.title: Microsoft’s open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
items.content: Microsoft shut down dozens of GitHub code repositories for Azure and AI coding tools after a reported hack.

items.title: Fed’s Warsh Says Inflation Poses Less Risk Than a Few Weeks Ago
items.content: The Federal Reserve chairman, Kevin Warsh, stressed that the central bank would “deliver price stability,” a point he has emphasized repeatedly since taking over in May.

items.title: Anthropic Won a Reprieve From the Trump Administration. Is It Enough?
items.content: The company can restore access to its most powerful A.I. models. But Silicon Valley remains worried about the Trump administration’s heavier hand on regulation.

items.title: As Companies Race for Cheaper A.I. Options, This Start-Up Pitches a Solution
items.content: Together AI, which specializes in open-source artificial intelligence models, is now worth more than $8 billion.

items.title: What to Know About the U.S.-Mexico-Canada Trade Agreement Talks
items.content: July 1 could be the beginning of the end for a trade pact President Trump has long criticized — or the start of a path to its renewal.
